HL7v2.5.1 standard: PID-3 is Patient Identifier List field (contains Medical Record Number). Verified against HL7 specification at https://www.hl7.eu/refactored/segPID.html and https://hl7-definition.caristix.com/v2/HL7v2.5.1/Fields/PID.5. Correctly maps from test_payload.patient.mrn

HL7v2.5.1 standard: PID-5 is Patient Name field using XPN (Extended Person Name) data type with format LastName^FirstName. Verified against HL7 specification at https://hl7-definition.caristix.com/v2/HL7v2.5.1/Fields/PID.5. Correctly converts patient.lastName^patient.firstName

HL7v2.5.1 standard: PID-7 is Date of Birth field in YYYYMMDD format (not YYYY-MM-DD). Verified against HL7 specification and confirmed in multiple sources (help.interfaceware.com, GRITS, CAIR2 guides). Correctly converts test_payload.patient.dateOfBirth='1990-01-01' to '19900101'

HL7v2.5.1 standard: PV1-19 is Visit Number field. Verified against HL7 specification at https://hl7-definition.caristix.com/v2/HL7v2.5.1/Segments/PV1. Correctly maps from test_payload.visit.visitNumber

HL7v2.5.1 standard: MSH-9 is Message Type field with structure MsgType^TriggerEvent^MessageStructure. Verified: ADT is the message type code (Admission/Discharge/Transfer), A04 is the trigger event (Register a patient/outpatient registration), ADT_A01 is the message structure ID. Verified against https://community.intersystems.com/post/types-hl7-adt-message-and-example-adta04 and https://www.hl7.eu/refactored/msgADT_A01.html

pi_items.metadata_value: test_payload in metadata and sample_registration.json created by setup_task.sh
pi_items.source: Inspection of setup_task.sh shows sample_registration.json is generated by the script (not downloaded). Test payload is defined in task.json metadata. Sample data includes fabricated patient 'Elena Rodriguez', synthetic phone number '507-555-0198' (reserved test range), and synthetic MRN 'MRN-2024-78432'

privileged_info_summary: All HL7v2.5.1 field mappings in the task metadata are correct: PID-3 is the Medical Record Number field (mapped from patient.mrn), PID-5 is the Patient Name field using XPN format LastName^FirstName (mapped from patient.lastName^patient.firstName), PID-7 is Date of Birth in YYYYMMDD format (correctly converted from YYYY-MM-DD format), PV1-19 is the Visit Number field, and MSH-9 is the Message Type field containing ADT^A04^ADT_A01 where A04 is the trigger event for outpatient patient registration. The task uses synthetic test data (fabricated patient records and test phone numbers in reserved ranges). The channel name is 'JSON_to_HL7_Gateway', the HTTP listener port is 6661, and output files are written to /tmp/hl7_output. No real patient data (PHI) is involved.
